label: Pending
description: pending[id] stored; Bus: question.asked published; QuestionDock mounted with cache lookup
actions: store pending[id] = { info, resolve, reject, dispose }
QuestionDock: lookup cache[sessionID+hash], restore store if hit

label: Replied
description: pending[id] deleted; promise resolved with answers; Bus: question.replied; QuestionDock unmounted (cache cleared via replied=true path)

label: Rejected (manual)
description: pending[id] deleted; promise rejected with RejectedError; Bus: question.rejected; QuestionDock unmounted

label: Aborted (stream)
description: AbortSignal fired; abort handler: delete pending + publish rejected + reject promise with RejectedError; QuestionDock unmounts (onCleanup preserves cache for future AI re-ask)
actions: QuestionDock.onCleanup: cache[sessionID+hash] = store snapshot (for re-ask restore)
